history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The next cell forward is (2, C) which is floor and safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column C, facing right. The goal is at row 4, column D. Moving forward will take me to row 2, column D, which is a safe floor cell. From there, I can turn clockwise to face down and then move forward twice to reach the goal. So the immediate next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column D, facing right. The cell in front of me (row 2, column E) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. I need to reach the goal at row 4, column D. To move towards the goal, I should face downward. Turning clockwise will make me face down. After that, I can move forward to row 3, column D (which is empty), and then to the goal. So my next action is to turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down. The goal is directly below at row 04 column D. The cell directly in front (row 03 column D) is floor and safe. So I will move forward one step.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row3, column D, facing down. The goal is directly ahead at row4, column D. Moving forward will take me to the goal cell. No obstacles or lava in between.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
